rulings.Case Title: BORREGAS COURT ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL VS. BOSTON FINANCIAL INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT A ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion By Third Parties To Quash The Trial Subpoena To Mark Clarke And To Order Plaintiff To Provide Reasonable Notice Of Appearance At Trial To Non-Party Witnesses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 22, 2020 line 1. OTHER EDISON MISSION GROUP, INC., MARK CLARKE Motion By Third Parties To Quash The Trial Subpoena To Mark Clarke And To Order Plaintiff To Provide Reasonable Notice Of Appearance At Trial To Non-Party Witnesses is continued to July 8, 2020. Trial is continued to September 21, 2020. If parties stipulate to a different hearing/trial date after July 8 /September 21, 2020 (respectively), parties may notify the Court at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org by 8:00 a.m. on May 22, 2020. No appearance required. Please be advised that this e-mail address is not regularly monitored and no other communications with the Court are allowed via this e-mail. =(501/CFH)
